creator: exploringlondon
caption: The most expensive coffee in London, costs how much per cup?! 🤯 @shot.london

transcription.text: Apparently this coffee shop in Mayfair serves the most expensive coffee in the whole of London. This is Shot London and one cup of their reserve single origin coffee grown in Okinawa, Japan costs £265. What's crazy is that this goes out of stock just a couple of weeks after it comes into stock. So if you want to try it you've got to be lucky. Unfortunately they didn't have it in stock when we went. So we tried their signature ice cube coffees where the ice cubes are made of coffee and they pour the right temperature milk over them to melt the coffee and create the perfect cup. It's definitely an experience and if you're not a coffee person they also do tea and hot chocolate. So let us know would you go and try it?
